title: アタシのタイマン、アンタのタイマン

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

A few weeks have passed since Hishi Amazon and
I promised to give the Tiara tour everything we've
got.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant! Argh, this is killin' me...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: No, I can't throw in the towel!

Hishi Amazon has bounced back from the
scrimmage, putting her heart and soul into her
training.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right, that's that for today's training schedule.
Now...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You can go home first if you want, Teach! I'm
gonna run a bit more!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Raaaahhh!

However, everything she confessed and declared
that day was very much genuine—that much I
know for sure.

Right now, she's doing all she can to become the
best version of herself—to become a Hishi
Amazon who is strong and confident.
choice_data_list: (There's only one thing I can do for her.)

text_block_list.text:
I once again pour time into researching Hishi
Amazon's running technique in order to support
her to the fullest as her trainer.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Phew! What a beautiful morning! You ready to
get this show on the road?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, what's wrong?! You're swayin' on your feet
like a pendulum!
I hand over the results of my studies.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hm, what's this notebook? "Training Notes for
Hishi Amazon"?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
"In order to use Hishi Amazon's abilities to the
fullest, focus on building muscular strength to
support her explosive bursts of speed."

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
"Strengthen the quadriceps, sartorius, and
adductor muscles using progressive overload..."

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
"Strengthen fast-twitch muscles by introducing a
new diet based on sports nutrition and routine
mountain trail runs, which double as recreation"...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hmm, interesting... Huh! Hahaha, oh wow!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't write somethin' this good with all the
help in the world. Thanks a lot, Teach!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'll put this to use right away and follow these
training methods today!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
And you should get some sleep! You're not gonna
be any good here with those panda eyes!
So begin our days of training using the booklet.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Haaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Third lap, finished! Wheeze...
choice_data_list: You've got this, only one more to go!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hrraagh!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, I hate sitting still for so long! I get that it's
important to learn about nutrition and stuff, but...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe you're able to read for so long.
That stuff's dense, too...
choice_data_list: I just want to do what I can to help.
I just want to do what I can to help.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Ah! You sure know what to say, Teach!

text_block_list.name: Library Assistant
text_block_list.text: Please keep quiet in the library.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Oh, my bad...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Grraaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh? Where'd Teach go?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Hey, you look beat! Are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hold on a sec, this is my training. Why don't you go take the cable car up instead?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh? What're you talkin' about?
choice_data_list: I don't want anything to happen to you.
I don't want anything to happen to you.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, c'mon... You're such a worrywart. I'll give you
a piggyback, so hop on!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hiking was gettin' too easy for me. Using you as
training weight will help mix things up!

We continue to work hard together, training day
after day...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant... How was that, Teach? What was my time?

When I check my stopwatch, I'm thrilled to see
what a big improvement she's made.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Booyah!

Without thinking, I write her time down in large
numbers in my booklet. She's going to do great if
she keeps this up!
choice_data_list: Let's keep going full steam ahead!

text_block_list.text:
I begin thinking of what kind of changes I'll have
to make to her training regimen to keep up with
her new record time.
choice_data_list:
Just as I'm pondering what we need to do to
turn things up a notch...

text_block_list.text:
I lock eyes with Hishi Amazon, who has
apparently been staring at me intently.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Oh, sorry 'bout that. It's nothing major.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: It's just... I thought that the Twinkle Series was my one-on-one, and mine alone.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I was gonna blast my way through, pickin'
whatever fights I wanted—winning all the glory
for myself.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But after takin' a step back and really looking at
things, I realize you're just as determined to win
as I am.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Once I realized that, I...
She smiles bashfully.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I finally saw that you're in this fight with me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Knowin' that my partner's really puttin' in the
work from the shadows... Well, it doesn't feel too
bad.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Argh, I can't do this sappy stuff! Anyway, what
training have you got for me?!
It won't be long till the Oka Sho is upon us.
